# meok-aaif-agent-card-mcp

> MEOK AAIF Agent Card MCP — Linux Foundation AAIF agent identity bridge. Issues + verifies + publishes /.well-known/agent-card. Bridges A2A and OASF to AAIF. First-mover for the AAIF identity spec. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- issue_agent_card
- publish_card
- verify_card
- bridge_a2a_to_aaif
- bridge_oasf_to_aaif
- list_capability_taxonomy
- sign_card_chain

## Install
```
pip install meok-aaif-agent-card-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-aaif-agent-card-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
